description_for_human: Search and analyze OPC UA specifications, NodeSets, companion specs, and validate compliance.
description_for_model: OPC UA Knowledge Base provides 11 tools to search, analyze, validate, and compare OPC UA specifications. Use search_docs_rag for natural language Q&A grounded by specs. Use search_nodes for structured NodeSet queries. Use validate_nodeset and check_compliance for XML validation. Use suggest_model for greenfield modelling guidance per OPC 11030.

conversation_starters.title: Pumps spec
conversation_starters.text: What ObjectTypes does the Pumps companion specification define?

conversation_starters.title: v1.04 vs v1.05
conversation_starters.text: What are the differences between OPC UA v1.04 and v1.05?

conversation_starters.title: Validate NodeSet
conversation_starters.text: Validate this NodeSet XML against OPC 11030 best practices.

conversation_starters.title: Find a NodeId
conversation_starters.text: What is the NodeId of UserCredentialCertificateType?

conversation_starters.title: Pub/Sub explained
conversation_starters.text: Explain the OPC UA Pub/Sub communication model and how it differs from client-server.
